falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug would be invalidated because the August 2024 bottom held above 5200; a break below would confirm this is not the same structural pattern and the macro floor is not in place

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled volatility; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate genuine panic-driven liquidation rather than the orderly bottoming process implied by the pattern match, invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and DXY simultaneously breaks above 105.50
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would signal a flight-to-safety recession panic rather than a growth-scare bottom, proving the current UNKNOWN verdict failed to distinguish between cyclical bottom and systemic risk-off

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
